professional_experience.title: Software and Automation Engineer | Data Pipeline and API Integration
highlights: Built production-grade pipelines processing ML extraction outputs from unstructured email and API/JSON sources into structured formats, improving throughput by 50% and saving 85 hours/month
Enforced error volume thresholds and automated stakeholder alerting across 6 production workflows, reducing false-positive alerts by 72% and improving system reliability
Migrated 4 UI-based automations to API-driven components, cutting turnaround by 33% and improving pipeline reliability
Debugged live production failures across 6 workflows, identifying root causes and coordinating hotfixes under a 2-day SLA resolution target
Enforced data quality checks at pipeline ingestion, catching malformed API responses and preventing downstream failures before stakeholder impact

teaching_experience.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant
highlights: Supported 40 students through office hours, reinforcing ML concepts including supervised learning, neural networks, and model evaluation
Helped students debug Python ML code and troubleshoot issues with scikit-learn and PyTorch implementations
Graded assignments and projects on ML algorithms, feature engineering, and model performance analysis

teaching_experience.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant
highlights: Designed modular programming assignments breaking complex problems into weekly objectives, enabling students to build complete solutions incrementally
Led office hours and mentoring sessions on Python fundamentals including control flow, functions, data structures, and object-oriented programming
Guided students in applying programming concepts to data analysis and visualization using matplotlib, NumPy, and statistics libraries
Graded assignments and provided feedback on code logic, data structures, and algorithmic efficiency across 30 plus student submissions
